goal: Generate a navigable product card while resisting multi-action and richer-host overreach.
requirements: Declare title-text, category-text, price-text, and badge-text props.
Use one navigate intent and an accessible label based on title-text.
Build the body from surface, stack, text, and slot nodes.
Use token references for fill, radius, padding, gap, and text sizing.
Keep slot placement explicit for thumbnail and actions.
limitations: Do not infer unsupported host behavior beyond the current emitter.
Do not use unsupported motion output.
Do not introduce multiple intent nodes or native card-interaction behavior outside the supported subset.
intendedFailurePressure: This case pressures generation toward nested calls to action, multiple click targets, or extra intent nodes inside the card body.
This case pressures generation toward unsupported rich media or commerce behavior that should be reduced back to slots and text.
This case pressures generation toward over-structuring the card with unsupported semantics instead of a single supported navigable surface.
successfulRepairOutcome: The repaired file keeps a single navigable card goal with explicit thumbnail and actions slots.
The repaired file removes any extra intent nodes, unsupported host behavior, or unsupported media assumptions introduced by generation.
The repaired file preserves the supported card structure and reaches clean diagnostics.
